GenAiFunction.description: Returns the valid column API names for a given report type. Call this AFTER List Report Types and BEFORE Create Salesforce Report. Pass the report type apiName from the previous step. Review the returned columns and pick only the ones the user needs — do not pass all columns to Create Report. The apiName values returned here are what you use in the "Columns" input of Create Salesforce Report.
GenAiFunction.masterLabel: WSM - ALF - Agent: Get Report Type Columns
